title: How a perfectly even universe grew galaxies - Adam Brown
summary: A Dwarkesh Patel interview featuring Adam Brown discussing the evolution of the early universe from uniform conditions to structured galaxy formation. The episode explores physical mechanisms underlying cosmological development.
